LanguageData.BlacklistHint: Checked entries are blacklisted and will not appear.
LanguageData.AcceptPatientsTooltip: uncheck this if you want to stop patients from visiting
LanguageData.AcceptSurgeryTooltip: uncheck this if you do not want to get surgery events
LanguageData.AcceptDangerTooltip: check this if you want to override the check if the map if safe for patients to arrive
LanguageData.SilverMultiplierTooltip: Changes the patients bill by this percentage. (recommended: 100%)
LanguageData.GoodwillGainMultiplierTooltip: Scales the goodwill earned from happy patients leaving. (default: 100%)
LanguageData.DeathGoodwillPenaltyTooltip: Goodwill lost with a faction when one of their patients dies. (default: 10)
LanguageData.SurgeryFailGoodwillPenaltyTooltip: Goodwill lost with a faction when a surgery on their patient fails. (default: 1)
LanguageData.DiseaseSeverityMultiplierTooltip: Scales how severe arriving patients' diseases are. Higher is harder. (default: 100%)
LanguageData.WoundSeverityMultiplierTooltip: Scales how badly wounded arriving patients are. Higher is harder. (default: 100%)
LanguageData.BedsReservedTooltip: To make sure your beds are not all filled up with patients
LanguageData.ShowMessageAtArrivalTooltip: Shows as a message instead of a letter when a new patient arrives.
LanguageData.MassCasualtiesTooltip: A MCE will sporadically overwhelm your hospital with patients.
LanguageData.CommandBedSetAsHospitalDesc: Whether this bed is for patients.
LanguageData.CommandBedSetAsSurgeryDesc: Whether this bed is for surgery patients.
